name: So Funny Youth
overview: The story of Zhang Xiaoran during her youth at Tianbao high school with her best friends, top student Zhu Chenghai, the energetic Lin Tao, spirited Xiang Nan, and the sluggish Zhao Rui.

trailers.title: ENGSUB【TRAILER】麻糖五子逐个报到，一起笑闹青春！| 当你年少时 So Funny Youth | 何与/陈怡馨/李嘉豪/牛泽萌/谭晓凡 | 青春校园 | YOUKU ROMANCE
